Maritime Services (Brokerage)

Reliable partners, clearly coordinated.

Not every shipping company or ship owner has the right service provider "on hand" for every case. This is exactly where MareSphere comes in: As a neutral, experienced partner, MareSphere supports in finding, addressing, and structurally integrating specialized maritime services, charter ships, or tugs as needed.

Mediation of Specialized Service Providers:

Support in selecting and contacting suitable companies, e.g., for technical operations, special cleaning, inspections, salvage, or support services.

Charter and Towing Support:

Support in finding suitable charter ships or tugs for specific operations, including coordination of general conditions and communication.

Coordination and Tracking:

Structured support from initial contact to implementation, including scheduling, information flow, and meaningful documentation of agreed services.

MareSphere does not act as a major provider, but as an independent coordinator with practical maritime experience and excellent access to various actors in the market.

Shipping connects. MareSphere helps bring the right partners together so that your projects at sea and in port are reliably implemented.
